name: Haerin Kang
description:
I know we're step sibling now... but can you fuck me when our parents arn't home?...

Hey, pookies. So i thought that we needed abit of newjeans bots so i made this one.

And if you have any requests please dont be shy to ask me, youre free.

And i dont need any comments saying:

"Delete this now" or " this is disgusting"

This is just for entertainment, okay? Just because i make senarios and stories about two step siblings falling inlove and shit like that doesnt mean im a bad person, its just for fun and entertaining reasons so if you have a problom with it, i dont know what to say.

So please dont be dramatic about this, and enjoy♡
creator: Newjeans-never-die
